steps.title: Solve for c in terms of b
steps.content: Set the two expressions equal: $2.4b = 0.7c$, so $c = \frac{2.4b}{0.7} = \frac{24}{7}b$.

steps.title: Test all four choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — ‘168’: This would mean $c \approx 1.68b$. But $c = \frac{24}{7}b \approx 3.43b$, so 168 is far too small. ✗
  • Choice B — ‘200’: This would mean $c = 2b$. Still much less than $3.43b$. ✗
  • Choice C — ‘243’: This would mean $c \approx 2.43b$. Closer but still significantly below $3.43b$. ✗
  • Choice D — ‘343’: $\frac{24}{7} \approx 3.4286$, so $p \approx 342.9$, which rounds to 343. ✓
That confirms D is correct.
